data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for real-time usage display.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the real-time usage display feature, specifically the message indicating remaining hours. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case describes the expected behavior, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the real-time usage display is functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence of real-time usage display functionality being tested or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the real-time usage display requirement.
